sectors.name: Financial Services
sectors.description: Banking, insurance, and capital markets AI regulation including credit scoring, fraud detection, algorithmic trading, and automated underwriting.

sectors.name: Healthcare
sectors.description: Medical AI regulation covering clinical decision support, diagnostic AI, drug discovery, and patient data processing.

sectors.name: Government & Public Sector
sectors.description: Public sector AI governance including welfare administration, law enforcement, border control, and citizen services.

sectors.name: Education
sectors.description: EdTech AI regulation covering algorithmic assessment, adaptive learning, student profiling, and academic integrity systems.

sectors.name: Manufacturing
sectors.description: Industrial AI governance for safety-critical systems, autonomous machinery, predictive maintenance, and quality control.

sectors.name: Telecommunications
sectors.description: Telco AI regulation for network optimization, customer profiling, content moderation, and automated service management.
